name: Get App Info
description: Retrieves detailed information about the application, including how-to guides, screenshots, videos, and metadata.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

requiredHeaders.name: api-key
requiredHeaders.description: This header should contain the environment-specific API key. Use the key corresponding to the current environment (e.g., development,qa, production) for authentication.

name: Get Games
description: Fetches a list of games available within the application, with options to filter by platform, genre, and other criteria.

parameters.name: gameIds
parameters.description: An array of unique game identifiers to fetch specific games.

parameters.name: isDefault
parameters.description: A boolean flag to indicate if only the default game should be fetched.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of games to return in the response.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of games to skip before starting to return results, for pagination.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A string to search for games by name.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: Tags to filter the Games.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

name: Get Currencies
description: Fetches currencies with optional filters such as currency IDs, type, attributes, search keyword, and tags. Supports pagination through offset and limit fields.

parameters.name: currencyIds
parameters.description: An array of currency IDs to filter results by.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter currencies by a specific type (virtual or real)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of currencies to return in the response.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of currencies to skip, used for paginated requests.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A string to search for currencies by name.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: An array of tags to filter the currencies by.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

requiredHeaders.name: api-key
requiredHeaders.description: This header should contain the environment-specific API key. Use the key corresponding to the current environment (e.g., development,qa, production) for authentication.

name: Get Matches
description: Retrieves data related to matches within the app, including leaderboards, competitions, and metadata.

parameters.name: matchIds
parameters.description: Optional array of match IDs sent in the request to fetch specific matches.

parameters.name: gameIds
parameters.description: Optional array of game IDs to filter matches by game.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of matches to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of matches to return in the response.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search keyword for filtering matches by name.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: Tags to filter the matches.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

name: Get Bundles
description: Retrieves in-game bundles that can include multiple items, currency packs, or gear sets. Useful for combining virtual goods into discounted or special-offer packages for players.

parameters.name: bundleIds
parameters.description: Array of specific bundle IDs to look up (e.g., 'starter_pack', 'holiday_bundle').

parameters.name: isLocked
parameters.description: Filter by locked (true) or unlocked (false) status. A locked bundle may require special conditions, like level requirements.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of bundles to skip (for paginated UIs).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of bundles to return in a single response.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search keyword to filter bundles by name

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: Array of tags to narrow down or categorize the bundles.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

name: Get Task Status
description: Fetches the status of tasks assigned to the player.

parameters.name: taskIds
parameters.description: An array of specific task IDs for which to fetch statuses.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of task statuses to return in the response.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of task statuses to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter to retrieve tasks with a specific status

parameters.name: scheduleStatuses
parameters.description: Array of schedule statuses to filter tasks (yet to start | in progress | stopped | expired)

parameters.name: includeTaskGroupTasks
parameters.description: Include tasks from task groups if set to true.

parameters.name: includeInactiveTasks
parameters.description: Include inactive tasks if set to true.

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Get Player Data
description: Retrieves additional data associated with the player.

parameters.name: keys
parameters.description: An optional array of keys to fetch specific player data.

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Get Tasks
description: Fetches a list of tasks (e.g., quests) used in the game. Supports filtering by task IDs, schedule statuses, and tags, and optionally includes tasks from task groups.

parameters.name: taskIds
parameters.description: An array of task IDs to fetch specific tasks.

parameters.name: includeTaskGroupTasks
parameters.description: If true, include tasks that belong to a task group.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of tasks to skip (for pagination).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tasks to return.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: An array of tags to filter the tasks by (e.g., 'daily', 'event').

parameters.name: scheduleStatuses
parameters.description: An array of schedule statuses to filter tasks.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

name: Get Task Group Status
description: Retrieves the status of task groups for the player.

parameters.name: taskGroupIds
parameters.description: An optional array of specific task group IDs for which to fetch statuses.

parameters.name: taskGroupTypes
parameters.description: An optional array of task group types to filter out the retrieved statuses by. (mission | step series)

parameters.name: scheduleStatuses
parameters.description: An array of schedule statuses to filter retrieved task group statuses.

parameters.name: includeInactiveTasks
parameters.description: A boolean flag to include inactive tasks in the results (eg: useful to fetch inactive missions in a Mission group).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of task groups to return in the response.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of task groups to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Get My Profile
description: Retrieves the profile of the player, including linked accounts and equipped items.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Get Markers
description: Fetches progression markers (e.g., XP) from the application. Supports pagination, searching, and optional attribute/tags filtering.

parameters.name: progressionMarkerIds
parameters.description: An array of progression marker IDs to fetch specific markers.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of progression markers to skip (pagination).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of progression markers to return (pagination).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A string to search for progression markers by name.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: A list of tags to filter or augment the progression marker data.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

requiredHeaders.name: api-key
requiredHeaders.description: This header should contain the environment-specific API key. Use the key corresponding to the current environment (e.g., development,qa, production) for authentication.

name: Get Tournament History
description: Fetches tournament history for the player.

parameters.name: competitionIds
parameters.description: An array of competition IDs to fetch tournaments.

parameters.name: scheduleStatuses
parameters.description: An array of schedule statuses to filter tournaments.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of tournaments to return in the response.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of tournaments to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Get Items
description: Fetches items with optional filtering by item IDs, attributes, locked status, and default loadout flags. Supports search and pagination.

parameters.name: itemIds
parameters.description: An array of item IDs to fetch specific items.

parameters.name: isLocked
parameters.description: Whether to filter items by locked (true) or unlocked (false) status.

parameters.name: isDefaultLoadout
parameters.description: Whether to filter items by default loadout status (true or false).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip (for pagination).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of items to return (for pagination).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search keyword to filter items by name.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: A list of tags to filter the items data.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

name: Get Progression Systems
description: Retrieves data for the progression systems and markers that drive in-game progression in your app. Filter by progression system IDs, progression marker IDs, or search keywords.

parameters.name: progressionSystemIds
parameters.description: An array of progression system IDs to fetch specific progression systems.

parameters.name: progressionMarkerIds
parameters.description: An array of progression marker IDs to filter the master data by specific markers.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A search keyword to filter progression systems by name.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: An array of tags to further filter the progression systems.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of progression system records to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of progression system records to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

name: Get Missions
description: Retrieves groups of tasks (missions) such as daily challenges or seasonal objectives. Missions can be filtered by task group IDs and types, schedule statuses, and tags. Optionally include inactive tasks.

parameters.name: taskGroupIds
parameters.description: An array of task group IDs used to filter the missions.

parameters.name: includeInactiveTasks
parameters.description: If true, inactive tasks within the mission groups will be included.

parameters.name: scheduleStatuses
parameters.description: An array of schedule status values to filter the missions based on their timing or progress

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of missions to return in a single response.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of missions to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: Additional tags to filter or annotate missions.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

name: Get Leaderboards
description: Retrieves leaderboards in the app. This endpoint supports filtering by leaderboard IDs, match IDs, and keywords, along with pagination and optional inclusion of extra attributes and tags.

parameters.name: leaderboardIds
parameters.description: An array of leaderboard IDs to fetch specific leaderboards.

parameters.name: matchIds
parameters.description: An array of match IDs to filter leaderboards by specific matches.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of leaderboard records to skip (for pagination).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of leaderboard records to return.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A keyword for searching across leaderboard names.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: An array of tags to further filter or annotate leaderboard data.

parameters.name: scheduleStatuses
parameters.description: An array of schedule statuses to filter leaderboards by timing

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

name: Get Tournaments
description: Retrieves tournament set up in your app. Filter tournaments by competition IDs, match IDs, search keywords, and schedule statuses.

parameters.name: competitionIds
parameters.description: An array of competition IDs to fetch specific tournaments.

parameters.name: matchIds
parameters.description: An array of match IDs to filter tournaments by specific matches.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of tournament records to skip (for pagination).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tournament records to return.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: An array of tags for filtering tournaments

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A search keyword to filter tournaments by name

parameters.name: scheduleStatuses
parameters.description: An array of schedule statuses to filter tournaments by timing.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

name: Get Step Series
description: Retrieves ordered sequences (step series) of tasks that form a ladder of challenges. This endpoint is ideal for progressive sequences where each task must be completed in order.

parameters.name: taskGroupIds
parameters.description: An array of task group IDs that identify the step series.

parameters.name: includeInactiveTasks
parameters.description: If true, the response includes tasks that are not currently active in the series.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of step series tasks to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of tasks to skip for pagination in the series.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: An array of tags to further filter or categorize the step series.

parameters.name: scheduleStatuses
parameters.description: An array of schedule statuses to filter the step series tasks.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

name: Get Stores
description: Retrieves details about the in-game store, listing items, currency packs, or other purchasable content for players.

parameters.name: storeIds
parameters.description: Array of store IDs to look up (e.g., 'main_store', 'holiday_shop').

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of stores to skip (for paginated UIs).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of store entries to return in a single response.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Keyword-based search for store names.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: Filter or categorize stores based on tags (e.g. 'featured', 'seasonal').

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

name: Get Reward History
description: Retrieves the history of rewards received by the player.

parameters.name: taskIds
parameters.description: An array of task IDs for which to fetch rewards earned if present.

parameters.name: taskGroupIds
parameters.description: An array of task group IDs for which to fetch rewards earned if present.

parameters.name: levelIds
parameters.description: An array of progression system level IDs for which to fetch rewards earned if present.

parameters.name: leaderboardIds
parameters.description: An array of leaderboard IDs for which to fetch rewards earned if present.

parameters.name: competitionIds
parameters.description: An array of competition IDs for which to fetch rewards earned if present.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter and fetch rewards earned by status.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of reward history entries to return in the response.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of entries to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Get Match History
description: Fetches the match history of the player.

parameters.name: matchSessionId

name: Custom Purchase
description: Processes a custom purchase with specified items and bundles, allowing custom pricing.

parameters.name: items
parameters.description: List of items to be purchased with specified pricing.

objectSchema.description: Unique identifier for the item.
Quantity of the item to be purchased.
Custom price per unit for the item.
Currency ID for the item's transaction.
Real-world currency identifier for the item, if applicable.
Store ID where the item is available.
ID of the collection if the item is part of a collection.
ID of the stack associated with the item.
Additional custom parameters associated with the item.

parameters.name: bundles
parameters.description: List of bundles to be purchased with specified pricing.

objectSchema.description: Unique identifier for the bundle.
Quantity of the bundle to be purchased.
Custom price per unit for the bundle.
Currency ID for the bundle's transaction.
Real-world currency identifier for the bundle, if applicable.
Store ID where the bundle is available.
ID of the collection if the bundle is part of a collection.
ID of the stack associated with the bundle.
Additional custom parameters associated with the bundle.

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization

name: Start Match Session
description: Initiates a new session for a specified match, enabling participants to engage and interact within the match environment.

parameters.name: matchSessionId
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the match session.

parameters.name: matchId
parameters.description: The identifier of the match to start the session for. Links the session to its corresponding match details.

parameters.name: userInfo
parameters.description: An array of user objects participating in the session. Contains essential information for each user involved.

objectSchema.description: Unique identifier for each user participating in the match session.
Unique identifier for users competition entry id (only needed if match is part of a compeititon)

parameters.name: competitionId
parameters.description: Identifier for the competition associated with the match session, linking the match to a specific competition event.

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Get Instant Battles
description: Retrieves data for instant battles - competitions based on a single instance of a match. Filter instant battles by competition IDs, match IDs, search keywords, and schedule statuses.

parameters.description: An array of competition IDs to filter instant battles.

parameters.name: matchIds
parameters.description: An array of match IDs to narrow down instant battle records.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of instant battle records to skip (for pagination).

parameters.name: limit

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: An array of tags to further refine or annotate instant battle data

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A keyword for searching instant battle titles.

parameters.name: scheduleStatuses
parameters.description: An array of schedule statuses for filtering instant battles.",

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Array of attributes to include in the response

parameters.name: referralCode

name: Get Store Categories
description: Retrieves a list of store categories (e.g., 'Weapons', 'Armor', 'Consumables') from a specific store.

parameters.name: storeId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the store from which to fetch categories (e.g. 'main_store').

parameters.name: categoryIds
parameters.description: Array of category IDs to fetch specific categories (e.g. ['weapon_cat', 'armor_cat']).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Maximum number of categories to return in a single response.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of categories to return in a single response.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Keyword-based search (e.g. 'potion', 'legendary') across category names.

Unique identifier for the item.
Quantity of the item to be removed.
Collection ID if applicable.

description: Enters a player into a RMG competition using the provided competition identifier, and optional instance, entry, and custom parameters.

parameters.name: competitionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the competition. This field is required.

parameters.name: entryId
parameters.description: Optional identifier for the competition entry.

parameters.name: customParams
parameters.description: Optional object containing additional custom parameters for the competition entry.

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Get Policies
description: Fetches policies for a given RMG currency, covering all wallet types such as deposit, withdrawal, bonus wallets, as well as additional policies like taxation and priority.

parameters.name: currencyId
parameters.description: The identifier of the RMG currency for which the policies will be fetched.

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Optional type of entity to filter policies (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, bonus).

parameters.name: entitySubType
parameters.description: Optional subtype for further filtering policies if required.

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Grant Multiple Custom Rewards
description: Grants rewards directly without reference to a source. Supports batch operations for multiple reward types.

parameters.name: rewards
parameters.description: Object containing rewards grouped by type.

objectSchema.description: Array of items to grant.
Item ID.
Quantity of the item.
Array of bundles to grant.
Bundle ID.
Quantity of the bundle.
Array of currencies to grant.
Currency ID.
Quantity of the currency.
Array of progression markers to grant.
Marker ID.
Quantity of the marker.

parameters.name: bypassLockCondition
parameters.description: Flag to bypass lock condition.

parameters.name: bypassLimitedEdition
parameters.description: Flag to bypass limited edition restriction.

parameters.name: customParams
parameters.description: Custom parameters for processing.

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Update Player Data
description: Updates or adds custom data fields for the player.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique ID of the player whose data is to be updated.

parameters.name: playerData
parameters.description: Array of player data objects containing update key and associated value.

objectSchema.description: Key of the data to be updated
Any valid json serializable value to associate the key with.

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Get Document Content
description: Retrieves the full HTML content of a specific document stored in the Specter platform, enabling you to display formatted text and styling information to users.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the document to retrieve.

name: Get Player Collections
description: Fetches collections owned by the player.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the user.

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Get Players
description: Retrieves a list of players using specified filters such as username, firstName, lastName, email, customId, or displayName. Supports pagination via limit and offset.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: An array of filter objects to query players. Each filter must specify a type (one of: username, firstName, lastName, email, customId, displayName) and a corresponding value.

objectSchema.description: The filter type. Allowed values: username, firstName, lastName, email, customId, displayName.
The value to search for with the specified filter type.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of player records to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of player records to skip for pagination.

name: Grant Reward by Source
description: Grants rewards based on an array of source objects defining the origin of the rewards.

parameters.name: sources
parameters.description: Array of source objects representing the origin of the rewards.

objectSchema.description: The unique identifier for the source.
The type of source, e.g., task or level.
Optional unique identifier for the source instance.
Flag to bypass lock condition.
Flag to bypass limited edition restriction.
Custom parameters for processing.

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Execute Deposit
description: Processes a deposit transaction by executing the deposit with the provided amount, currency, and external payment reference.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The deposit amount to be processed. Must be provided as an integer.

parameters.name: currencyId
parameters.description: The identifier for the currency used in the deposit transaction. Must be provided as a string.

parameters.name: referenceId
parameters.description: The unique reference identifier received from the external payment gateway when an order is placed.

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Remove Player Data
description: Removes specified player data keys from the user's profile.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the user.

parameters.name: keysToRemove
parameters.description: Array of keys to remove from player data.

requiredHeaders.name: Authorization
requiredHeaders.description: A valid Authorization ('Bearer <token>') is required to grant access for the player's session.

name: Welcome
description: Initial welcome endpoint for the app, providing a basic response or status message upon first access.

description: Grants a single reward directly for simpler use cases.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the reward (e.g., item, bundle).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the reward.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Quantity of the reward to grant.

parameters.name: bypassLockCondition

name: Get Master Data
description: Retrieves reference data that defines standardized values used throughout the Specter platform, including data types, platforms, genres, event types, and other configuration constants.

parameters.name: instanceId
parameters.description: Instance ID of the Gacha bundle to be opened.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the gacha bundle.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: Collection ID if applicable.

parameters.name: stackId
parameters.description: Stack ID associated with the bundle.

parameters.name: customParams
parameters.description: Any additional custom parameters associated with the gacha bundle.
